projectDescription: An Odoo 18 website theme and module for technology service companies, featuring a corporate website with services pages, portfolio, bidding/quote request system, and backend management views.
keyFeatures: Corporate homepage with hero carousel, service cards, portfolio grid, pricing plans, and testimonials
Dedicated pages for Services, Portfolio, About Us, and Bidding/Quote Requests
Bidding request system with web form, automatic email confirmation, and Odoo backend management
Full Odoo backend integration with list, form, and kanban views for managing bidding requests
JSON API endpoint for checking bidding request status
Custom CSS theme with brand colors, animated counters, scroll reveal, and portfolio filters
Responsive design built on Odoo 18 website module with Bootstrap
publicApiSurface: GET /nosotros — Renders the about us page
GET /licencias — Renders the bidding/quote request page
POST /submit-bidding — Submits a new bidding/quote request (creates zonaweb.bidding.request record)
POST /api/bidding-status (JSON) — Returns current status and last update date of a bidding request
zonaweb.bidding.request Odoo model — Core data model for bidding/quote requests
BiddingRequest.action_confirm() — Transitions request to confirmed state
BiddingRequest.action_approve() — Transitions request to approved state
BiddingRequest.action_reject() — Transitions request to rejected state
